name: Mashies Golf Lounge
about: Mashies Golf Lounge is an indoor golf facility featuring TrackMan iO simulators, offering world-famous virtual golf courses in a climate-controlled environment. The venue provides 24/7 access and a laid-back lounge atmosphere, suitable for solo practice, friendly games, and team events. Membership options include monthly, annual, and corporate plans, with benefits like complimentary snacks and drinks, while also offering private party rentals for larger groups.
why_golfers_like_it: World-class TrackMan iO technology with real-time feedback
Complimentary snacks and drinks included with membership
Affordable pricing with flexible membership tiers
Suitable for both casual play and serious practice

food_and_drink.notes: Complimentary snacks available during tee time with membership
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading technology used by pros; real-time feedback on distance, spin rate, launch angle

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies; it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Complimentary snacks and drinks are provided with membership. BYOB policies are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a duration for 18 holes, but session limits range from 2-3 hours depending on membership tier.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly amenities or policies is provided on the website.
